action.reasoning: Observation: Current predict.py (heuristic planner) yields 0% success in local test; robot explores very little and stops early. Analysis: Bugs in graph handling, path reconstruction, or action selection cause planner to fail. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with a clean greedy-utility + BFS-to-global-max heuristic (similar to the one that scored 0.55 in iter 13). Test on 15 training maps to verify success rate recovers to >0.7, then submit evaluation to baseline and measure score.
